title: Pre-populate sample products for ordering

requirements.text: Pre-populate the backend with at least 10 diverse sample products across multiple categories (e.g., Electronics, Clothing, Home & Kitchen) with realistic names, descriptions, prices, stock quantities, and placeholder image URLs, so that users can immediately browse and place orders without manual data entry.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 10 products exist in the backend after initialization.
Products span at least 3 distinct categories.
Each product has a non-empty name, description, category, price > 0, stock quantity > 0, and an image URL.
Products are visible in the product catalog page without any admin action.

requirements.text: Update the SeedProducts component (frontend/src/components/SeedProducts.tsx) to include the same expanded set of sample products matching those added to the backend, so admins can re-seed the catalog if needed.
acceptanceCriteria: The Seed Products button in the Admin Dashboard creates at least 10 products across 3+ categories.
Seeded products appear immediately in the product catalog grid.
Each seeded product has a valid image URL, price, and stock quantity so it can be added to the cart and ordered.

constraints: Do not alter existing order, cart, or authentication logic.
Sample product image URLs must be publicly accessible placeholder/stock URLs.
nonGoals: Adding new product fields beyond the existing schema (id, name, description, category, price, stock, imageUrl).
Changing the Admin dashboard layout or order management functionality.
